official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound tab_list body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns tab_list to packet id 0x7a.
The official tab_list body is trusted Component header followed by trusted Component footer.
The generated fixture uses Component.literal("rustmine tab header") and Component.literal("rustmine tab footer") only.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded header/footer text values, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove rich Component forms, player-list UI behavior, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer rich Component, player-list UI behavior, or client-load completion.
